projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce solution built with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Features include user authentication, payment processing, and admin dashboard.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task management application with real-time updates, drag-and-drop functionality, and team collaboration features.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: A responsive weather dashboard that displays current conditions, forecasts, and interactive maps using multiple weather APIs.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: This very portfolio website built with Astro, React, and TypeScript, featuring dark mode, responsive design, and smooth animations.
